title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 4–7, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I won't let you get away this time!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That guy doesn't seem to be able to go on for a day without lying!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If I ever catch him, I'll make him pay!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee He

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I have fooled the whole village again!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I am very happy... I've done another good deed today!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I've helped add some excite- went to this boring village!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: USOPPP's pirate crew ready for action!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
